title: TeaMod
description: Teamod adds a cozy tea lineup to Minecraft—Green Tea, Oolong Tea, and Black Tea—brewed for adventurers who like a warm sip between quests.
body:
Teamod is a tea-focused Minecraft mod that introduces three brews with clearly different vibes and uses: Green Tea, Oolong Tea, and Black Tea. Each drink is built around the idea of oxidation—Green Tea is minimally oxidized (light and fresh), Oolong is partially oxidized (balanced and aromatic), and Black Tea is fully oxidized (deep and bold). This oxidation system isn’t just flavor text: it’s a simple, intuitive way to understand the “tea spectrum” and how each cup fits into your playstyle.

And of course, the cups do something real when you drink them:

- Green Tea grants Regeneration — for those moments when you want your health to quietly stitch itself back together.

- Oolong Tea grants Health Boost — a sturdier body, like wrapping your heart in a warm scarf.

- Black Tea grants Speed — because sometimes you don’t need armor, you need legs. (Preferably fast ones.)

Teamod is also designed to be modpack-friendly, aiming to work smoothly in any modpack, from vanilla-plus to massive kitchen-sink packs.
